Home.brandStoryText: From the depths of Cambodian forests to the Arabian Peninsula, we source the finest oud and musk to deliver an extraordinary fragrance experience.
Home.newsletterText: Subscribe for exclusive offers and new arrivals

Product.freeShipping: Free shipping on orders over 200 SAR

Checkout.title: Checkout
Checkout.thankYou: Thank you for shopping with AJoud

Footer.aboutText: AJoud — a Saudi luxury brand specializing in rare Cambodian oud and premium musk. We offer the finest oriental fragrances with a modern touch.

About.title: About AJoud
About.subtitle: From Nature's Heart to Your Elegance
About.story: Founded in 2025 with a clear vision: to bring the finest natural oud and musk from their original sources in Cambodia and Southeast Asia to oriental fragrance enthusiasts in Saudi Arabia.
About.missionText: We strive to deliver a unique fragrance experience that combines authenticity and luxury, while maintaining unmatched quality in every drop.

Policies.shippingFreeText: We offer free shipping on all orders over 200 SAR within Saudi Arabia.
Policies.shippingCoverageText: We deliver to all cities across Saudi Arabia without exception.
Policies.shippingInternationalText: We offer international shipping to GCC countries (UAE, Kuwait, Bahrain, Qatar, Oman). Delivery times and costs vary by destination.
Policies.shippingTrackingText: Once your order is shipped, you will receive a tracking number via SMS or email to follow your shipment in real time.
Policies.returnsWindowText: You may return your product within 7 days from the date of delivery.
Policies.returnsConditionText: The product must be unopened and in its original sealed packaging. Opened or used products cannot be returned.
Policies.returnsRefundText: Refunds are processed to the original payment method within 5-7 business days after we receive the returned product.
Policies.returnsExchangeText: If you receive a damaged or defective product, you can exchange it for a new one free of charge.
Policies.returnsHowText: To initiate a return, contact us via WhatsApp and we will arrange the return process for you.
Policies.privacyDataText: We collect only the information necessary to process your order: name, email address, phone number, and shipping address.
Policies.privacyThirdPartyText: We do not share your personal data with any third parties. Your information is securely stored and used solely for order processing purposes.
Policies.privacyPaymentText: All payments are processed through secure, encrypted payment gateways. We do not store your credit card information.
Policies.privacyCookiesText: We use cookies to improve your browsing experience and remember your preferences. You can disable cookies in your browser settings.
Policies.privacyContactText: For any inquiries regarding your data privacy, you can reach us via email.
Policies.termsUseText: By using the AJoud website, you agree to comply with these terms and conditions. Please read them carefully before making any purchase.
Policies.termsProductsText: We make every effort to ensure the accuracy of product descriptions and images. Colors may vary slightly due to screen settings. All our products are 100% authentic.
Policies.termsPricingText: All prices are displayed in Saudi Riyals (SAR) and include VAT. We reserve the right to modify prices without prior notice.
Policies.termsCancellationText: You may cancel your order before it is shipped. After shipping, our standard return policy applies. To cancel, contact us immediately via WhatsApp.
Policies.termsLiabilityText: AJoud is not liable for any indirect damages resulting from the use of products. Our liability is limited to the value of the purchased product.

Contact.title: Contact Us
Contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you anytime
Contact.formSuccess: Your message has been sent successfully! We'll get back to you soon.

Common.notFoundText: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.
